name: Garrett Motion Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Garrett is a cutting-edge technology leader delivering differentiated solutions for emission reduction and energy efficiency. We design, manufacture and sell highly engineered turbocharging, air and fluid compression, and high-speed electric motor technologies for original equipment manufacturers ("OEMs") and independent aftermarket distributors in the mobility and industrial fields.
